agent.name: Web Master
agent.description: Your personal web developer intern. It builds your website, writes blog posts, manages your data, sends you reports, and updates anything on demand — just tell it what you need.
agent.vibe: designs it, builds it, ships it

scripts.build: cd workspace/projects/astro-app && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.start: cd workspace/projects/astro-app && HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=4321 node dist/server/entry.mjs
